detailed_findings.required_text: Provide information to demonstrate compliance and allow audits

detailed_findings.regulation: UK Data Protection Law - Breach Notification
UK Data Protection Law - Processor Requirements
detailed_findings.required_text: Process only on documented written instructions from controller

detailed_findings.regulation: UK Data Protection Law - Individual Rights
detailed_findings.required_text: Provide assistance to enable data subject rights requests

detailed_findings.regulation: UK Data Protection Law - Cross-Border Transfers
detailed_findings.required_text: Lawful transfer mechanism required (SCCs, adequacy decision, or approved framework)
detailed_findings.findings: MSA includes lawful transfer mechanism: uk scc, standard contractual clauses, data bridge, uk-us data bridge, adequacy, privacy framework

detailed_findings.regulation: UK Data Protection Law - Security Requirements
detailed_findings.required_text: Implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures
detailed_findings.findings: MSA specifies comprehensive security measures: encryption, access control, security measure, technical and organisational, penetration testing, vulnerability, multi-factor
